expectations.evidence: Section 1 states: 'File: skills/generate-status-report.md (the "Generate Status Report" sub-skill)' with its 5-step process.

expectations.text: Runs at least 3 different JQL queries (completed, in-progress, blocked)
expectations.evidence: Section 3 shows 6 queries: completed (statusCategory = Done, resolved >= -7d), in-progress (statusCategory = In Progress), blocked (status = Blocked), newly created, open bugs, and stale items.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs search with project = PHOENIX
expectations.evidence: All 6 queries use 'jira.mjs search' with 'project = PHOENIX' in the JQL.

expectations.text: Formats a report with sections (metrics, highlights, blockers, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Section 5 shows a report template with: Executive Summary, Completed This Week, In Progress, Blockers & Risks, Upcoming Work, and Metrics sections.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs create-page to publish to the ENG space
expectations.evidence: Section 6 shows: 'confluence.mjs create-page --space ENG --title "Weekly Status Report - PHOENIX - 2026-03-18" --body ...'.

expectations.text: Includes a date in the page title
expectations.evidence: Page title is 'Weekly Status Report - PHOENIX - 2026-03-18' which includes the date.
Section 7 Reference Files table lists both 'references/report-templates.md' and 'references/jql-patterns.md' with detailed usage.
